入手方法: イベント: Bonus Pick - Parallel Foil Mass Outbreak Event
ミッション: Get 15 points in solo battles - Elite Deck Gift Missions

カードの効果.発動効果: Switch out your opponent’s Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)
カードの効果.追加ルール: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.
